channel.title: Policy & Security Think Tank Updates
channel.description: Custom RSS feed from CSIS, CFR, and other policy institutions

item.title: Why “Mowing the Grass” Won’t Work in Iran
item.description: If the United States decides to pursue the strategy of "mowing the grass" in Iran, it could lay the foundation for prolonged regional instability and global disruption.

item.title: Iran Resisted a Powerful Attacker. Taiwan Can Too.
item.description: Lessons from the U.S.-Iran war “can help Taiwan transform itself into a far more formidable obstacle to Chinese aggression,” write CSIS’s Daniel Byman and Seth G. Jones in The New York Times.
